message:
feat(core): add starvation prevention tracker and fairness metrics (ft-2p9cb.2.4.1)

StarvationTracker with windowed CPU share monitoring, Gini coefficient,
force-promotion on starvation detection, LaneFairnessState, StarvationEvent,
FairnessSnapshot. 14 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
